subcodes.first_line: Having heard the sweet melodies of Hijaz from the Countenance of Iraq, now hearken unto the spiritual strains of Shahnaz [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون نغمات لطیف حجازی را از طلعت عراقی شنیدی حال نواهای شهناز معنویرا
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @music and singing, @effort; striving, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @spiritual springtime, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @symbolism, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God
